tuned_scimitar.name: Tuned scimitar
tuned_scimitar.examine: Annealed against the Cadence Stone. The swing lands on the beat; complaints land on deaf ears.

tuned_warblade.name: Tuned warblade
tuned_warblade.examine: Heavy on the downbeat. Whatever note it rings is mostly somebody else's problem.

drillmasters_baton.name: Drillmaster's baton
drillmasters_baton.examine: Standard issue. It has taught a thousand recruits and respected none of them.

concord_helm.name: Concord helm
concord_helm.examine: The padding hums a held fifth. Thoughts start arriving in time signatures.

concord_platebody.name: Concord platebody
concord_platebody.examine: Concord plate. Blows that land off the beat are simply not acknowledged.

concord_platelegs.name: Concord platelegs
concord_platelegs.examine: Each greave tuned a fourth apart. Marching becomes involuntary.

concord_cape.name: Cape of Concord
concord_cape.examine: The full chord, clasped at the throat. Wear the rest of the set and it resolves.

cadence_gauntlets.name: Cadence gauntlets
cadence_gauntlets.examine: Knuckles that keep count for you.

metronome_charm.name: Metronome charm
metronome_charm.examine: Tick, swing. Tock, swing. Keeps you on the beat; the beat declined to comment.

valour_token.name: Valour token
valour_token.examine: Stamped bell-bronze. The Hold's only honest currency: it cannot be earned sitting down.

sustain_brew.name: Sustain brew
sustain_brew.examine: Tastes like barley and one held note. The infirmarian swears by it, mostly at recruits.

true_note_blade.name: True-note blade
true_note_blade.examine: Forged on the Cadence Stone itself. It has never missed the beat; you are merely the instrument.

spec.name: Perfect Cadence
spec.desc: Land the one note the world was sung to: +20% damage and a guaranteed resonance bleed.

metronome_dummy.name: Metronome dummy
metronome_dummy.examine: Straw, leather, and a small bell. Hit it on the beat and it rings; hit it off the beat and it judges.

reinforced_dummy.name: Reinforced dummy
reinforced_dummy.examine: Iron-banded and unimpressed. It only rings for a properly weighted blow.

cadence_pillar.name: Cadence pillar
cadence_pillar.examine: Cut from the Cadence Stone's casing. Striking it is sparring with the tempo itself.

cadence_anvil.name: Cadence anvil
cadence_anvil.examine: It hums a low A before your hammer ever lands. Metal annealed here rings true.

drillmaster_concord.name: Drillmaster Concord
drillmaster_concord.examine: Forty years of drills and not one missed downbeat. Her shout has its own time signature.

quartermaster_bell.name: Quartermaster Bell
quartermaster_bell.examine: Sells anything that swings, and ledgers every gram of it.

valour_steward.name: Valour Steward
valour_steward.examine: Keeper of the Hold's honours. Counts tokens the way a metronome counts beats: exactly.

hold_infirmarian.name: Hold Infirmarian
hold_infirmarian.examine: Patches up enthusiasm-related injuries. Has opinions about your guard.

sparring_veteran.name: Sparring veteran
sparring_veteran.examine: Knows the drills well enough to be dangerous on the off-beat too.

sparring_champion.name: Champion's Echo
sparring_champion.examine: It fights the way the Cadence Stone keeps time: inevitably.

sharedEdits.snippet: Add alongside the other pack imports: import './drummars_hold';

sharedEdits.what: Register the new server intent domain
sharedEdits.snippet: Add next to the existing `import './intent-misc';` side-effect import: import './intent-melee';

sharedEdits.what: Smithables loader (~line 735) must fold the new optional extraInputs[] into inputs[] so the resonant_shard cost on tuned_scimitar/tuned_warblade is enforced (make handler already iterates inputs[] generically)

The 'make' intent hardcodes stationReq 'anvil' (server/intents.ts ~line 424) and nearObject(x,y,'anvil'); the Cadence anvil tile must also carry type 'anvil' or smithing there fails. The fragment already emits BOTH {type:'cadence_anvil'} and {type:'anvil'} at dx 12, dy 26 (absolute 162,121) — keep both when baking. Alternative (code fix): widen the check at line 428 to `if (stationReq && !nearObject(ctx.x, ctx.y, stationReq) && !(stationReq === 'anvil' && nearObject(ctx.x, ctx.y, 'cadence_anvil')))` and drop the duplicate 'anvil' map object.

sharedEdits.file: server/combat.ts (profile builder) + server/index.ts deriveCombatProfile call path
sharedEdits.what: Concord set bonus (NEW engine code per verdict E): concord_cape carries a data-only `setBonus` field { name:'Perfect Cadence', requires:[concord_helm, concord_platebody, concord_platelegs], accMult:1.05, refundChance:0.125 }. In the combat profile builder, after equipment bonuses are summed: if equipment.neck is concord_cape AND every id in setBonus.requires is equipped in its slot (head/body/legs), multiply the derived melee accuracy by setBonus.accMult and push 'perfect_cadence' onto effectGear. Optionally, in the npc-death hook path, when perfect_cadence is in effectGear roll Math.random() < refundChance to grant back floor(half the valour_token cost of the killed reward purchase) — if that refund proves awkward, ship accMult only; the cape is balanced without the refund.
sharedEdits.snippet: const cape = state.equipment?.neck; const sb = cape && ITEMS[cape.id]?.setBonus; if (sb && Array.isArray(sb.requires) && sb.requires.every((id) => [state.equipment?.head, state.equipment?.body, state.equipment?.legs].some((e) => e?.id === id))) { profile.accMult = (profile.accMult ?? 1) * (sb.accMult ?? 1); profile.effectGear.push('perfect_cadence'); }
